Package io.vertigo.ui.controllers

Class ListAutocompleteController

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.ui.impl.springmvc.controller.AbstractVSpringMvcController
io.vertigo.ui.controllers.ListAutocompleteController
@Controller @RequestMapping("/autocomplete") public final class ListAutocompleteController extends AbstractVSpringMvcController
Service web de l'autocomplete des listes.
Author:
npiedeloup
